cmd/Cmd/undoc_header.name: undoc_header
cmd/Cmd/undoc_header.description: The header to issue if the help output has a section for undocumented commands (that is, there are do_*() methods without corresponding help_*() methods).

info.excerpt: The header to issue if the help output has a section for undocumented commands (that is, there are do_*() methods without corresponding help_*() methods).

cmd/Cmd/use_rawinput.name: use_rawinput
cmd/Cmd/use_rawinput.description: A flag, defaulting to true. If true, cmdloop() uses input() to display a prompt and read the next command; if false, sys.stdout.write() and sys.stdin.readline() are used. (This means that by importing readline, on systems that support it, the interpreter will automatically support Emacs-like line editing and command-history keystrokes.)
